S.O. 1682(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of section 3 of the Rehabilitation Council of India Act, 1992 (34 of 1992), the Central Government hereby appoints Shri Vinay Dinu Tendulkar, Member of Parliament, Rajya Sabha, as member in the Rehabilitation Council of India, and for that purpose, makes further amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment, Department of -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities(Divyangjans) number S.O.1509(E), dated 15th June, 2009, for serial number (25) and entry relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be substituted, namely:- “(25) Shri Vinay Dinu Tendulkar, -Member” Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha), C-302, Swarna Jayanti Sadan, Dr. B.D.Marg, New Delhi [F.No. 29-8/2016-NI] DOLLY CHAKRABARTY, Jt. Secy. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
